## Related issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / infra

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Web: `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` pass
- [ ] Broker: `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, and `cargo test` pass
- [ ] Schema changes include a Prisma migration and `npx prisma validate` passes
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or internal/private data are committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed
